productDisplayName: Nike Women Casual Grey Track Pant
description: Composition Grey track pant made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a broad elasticated waistband with drawstring, and embroidered branding below the waistband on the left and at the back on the right Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with like colours using warm water Do not bleach, or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Whatever the occasion, a visit to the mall or park, jogging or just hanging out with friends, this track pants from nike is a well deserved addition to your casual wardrobe. The sporty look does wonders for your casual style and the soft fabric keeps you extremely comfy. Pair this with a sporty T-shirt and running shoes. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 28"
